name: nis2
description: EU NIS2 Directive (Directive (EU) 2022/2555) compliance advisor for essential and important entities — entity classification, Art. 21 risk management measures, Art. 23 incident reporting timelines (24h/72h/1 month), Art. 20 governance obligations, supply chain security (Art. 26), gap assessments, policy drafting, ISO 27001 alignment, and penalty exposure analysis.
